thread_native_interface.mention_pattern: @Flywheel run a GTM sprint for <product> / send Flywheel a GTM sprint request

approval_actions.label: Show Flywheel capabilities and commands
approval_actions.safety_note: Explains what Flywheel can do and how to interact with it.

approval_actions.label: Walk me through the draft step by step
approval_actions.safety_note: Switches from dashboard review to sequential section review.

approval_actions.label: Finalize sprint after section review
approval_actions.safety_note: Finalizes the sprint plan only; it does not send, post, or spend.

approval_actions.label: Ask Flywheel to revise the draft sprint
approval_actions.safety_note: Use in Slack to steer the GTM employee in-thread.

approval_actions.label: Show review/finalization status
approval_actions.safety_note: Lists remaining draft sections before finalization.

approval_actions.label: Review Launch channels
approval_actions.safety_note: Approves or edits this plan section; execution approvals unlock only after `finalize sprint`.

approval_actions.label: Review Backlink/listing opportunities
approval_actions.safety_note: Approves or edits this plan section; execution approvals unlock only after `finalize sprint`.

approval_actions.label: Review Outbound targets
approval_actions.safety_note: Approves or edits this plan section; execution approvals unlock only after `finalize sprint`.

approval_actions.label: Review Content plan
approval_actions.safety_note: Approves or edits this plan section; execution approvals unlock only after `finalize sprint`.

approval_actions.label: Review Stripe MPP spend cards
approval_actions.safety_note: Approves or edits this plan section; execution approvals unlock only after `finalize sprint`.

approval_actions.label: Review Budget/spend gates
approval_actions.safety_note: Approves or edits this plan section; execution approvals unlock only after `finalize sprint`.

audit_notes: All outbound, posting, and spend actions remain approval-gated.
Stripe MPP spend cards model paid GTM procurement and require founder approval before any payment authorization.
Routine progress should stay out of the human Slack thread.
The final callback should summarize outcomes and ask for numbered approvals.
